value_propositions: Flexible payment plansfor the momentsthat matter
Pay-over-time plans with clear terms and service excellence — making important purchases possible with peace of mind.
More Ways to Pay, More Peace of Mind
From upfront clarity to better rates, flexible scheduling, and live support, ClarityPay makes managing big purchases simple.
Instant Pre-Approval, No Credit Impact
Understand full approval amounts and offers available with no hard pull credit pulls prior to commitment.**
Financing plans that are built on clarity, removing the guesswork with straightforward terms and disclosures.
AutoPay & Scheduling Tools
Set up AutoPay or use advance scheduling tools to stay on track with ease or pay in advance without penalty.
Dedicated lines with businesses that accept ClarityPay enable additional approvals for the next purchase, with all payments managed in a single online account.
Live Support, 7 Days a Week
Understand full approval amounts and offers available with no hard pull credit pulls prior to commitment.
Our financing plans are built on clarity, removing the guesswork with straightforward terms and disclosures.
Set up autopay or use advance scheduling tools to stay on track with ease or pay in advance without penalty.
Sign in to view the next payment due, add a payment method, or enable AutoPay.
English & Spanish support when you need us most.

No, you will get access to the ClarityPay application through the business you’re making your purchase with. We work with businesses (service providers, retailers, and other merchants) as a lending technology platform to help their customers, like you, get access to payment plans and other financing offers with an easy, digital application.

value_propositions: Credit solutions that power next generation commerce
ClarityPay delivers point-of-sale credit solutions that unlock growth and loyalty opportunities for merchants and  consumers alike.

With precision, speed, and purpose, we resolve complex credit challenges to give businesses confidence to grow and customers peace of mind to buy. From full-spectrum lending to configurable offers and seamless omnichannel experiences, ClarityPay combines deep expertise and advanced technology to simplify the customer’s experience and deliver better outcomes for merchants, every time.

“We empower merchants to take full control of their commerce flows by providing capital to serve more of their clientele and elevate their brand. We are merchant first so that merchants can be customer first.”
Decades of credit, risk, lending, and payments expertise—guiding a global team of 100+ technology and financing professionals.
ClarityPay ExpandPOS Lending Solution to Boost Merchant Sales Growth
ClarityPay is expanding their all-in-one point of sale lending solution to offer...
We solve credit challenges with purpose, driven by data and collaboration, always learning to unlock new opportunities for merchants and customers.
trust_badges: Headshot of ClarityPay founder, Houman Motaharian
ClarityPay team smiling on rooftop of high-rise building in New York city
Mockup of ClarityPay slogan "Powering Real Loans from Real Banks"

value_propositions: At ClarityPay, we tackle credit’s toughest challenges—empowering merchants across retail, home, health, auto, and more to grow faster, while helping their customers get approved with confidence.
trust_badges: Mockup of ClarityPay slogan "Powering Real Loans from Real Banks"
Solve What Matters. Build With Purpose. Win With Trust.

value_propositions: Customer Support
trust_badges: Mockup of ClarityPay slogan "Powering Real Loans from Real Banks"

value_propositions: No, you will get access to the ClarityPay application through the business you’re making your purchase with. We work with businesses (service providers, retailers, and other merchants) as a lending technology platform to help their customers, like you, get access to payment plans and other financing offers with an easy, digital application.
At this time, ClarityPay only supports loans with the individual that applies, and does not offer joint or cosigned loans

Bank account, debit card, and credit card information can help verify your identity, as that information can be compared to the information that the bank has on record, and it can also be used to initiate small transfers (of ten cents or less) to or from your account. These methods can help validate the authenticity and validity of the accounts, avoid errors, and prevent identify theft.
Once you sign in, you will see a summary of your loan, payment plan, amount due, and amount due date. This is also where you can adjust your payment method as needed or turn on AutoPay.
Please reach out to support@claritypay.com. Ensure you email us from your registered email address on your loan account to help validate your identity.

To make a payment, sign in to your account and select "Make Payment" on the dashboard. You can schedule the date and select the amount to pay. If you haven’t already, you can also “Turn on AutoPay” directly in your account for the easy way to always pay on time, automatically.

Sign in and click on ‘AutoPay’ or ‘Make Payment’ on the dashboard. In either destination you will see the opportunity to add or modify your payment method. Also, you can update your payment details on the Profile & Settings page.

Sign into your account (account.claritypay.com). Once signed in, you’ll see your loan summary view and a link to ‘Autopay is Off’. Click the link and see the toggle to ‘Turn on’ AutoPay. After you click the toggle you’ll be directed to confirm or add a payment method.

That’s it! Enjoy on-time, automatic payments and we’ll send notifications after your payments have been made so you know you’re on track. Need assistance? Our support team is happy to help guide you through the steps or securely set up AutoPay for you. Contact us.

Call us at 1-800-272-6100 between 8am and 9pm ET and our support team will assist you in turning off AutoPay.Please be sure to call us at least 3 days before your next payment date to ensure your changes go into effect prior to the scheduled date.
Call us at 1-800-272-6100 and we’ll be happy to help modify your payment schedule to better work for you. Our customer support team is available daily from 8am to 9pm ET.
Payments that are successfully processed will appear in your bank or credit/debit account as ClarityPay – DR Bank.

Once your loan has been fully processed and ready to start, you will receive an email with all details – including your first payment due date. You can view your due date, make a payment, or enroll in Autopay anytime within your account (account.claritypay.com).
trust_badges: Mockup of ClarityPay slogan "Powering Real Loans from Real Banks"

value_propositions: Tailored point-of-sale credit solutionsto drive more  acquisition & loyalty

ClarityPay gives more of your customers a better way to pay over time.With a program designed around your strategies, ClarityPay drives acquisition, sales, loyalty, and seamless omnichannel experiences.

Full suite of products to help customers make purchases more accessible in the moment: true 0%, promotional financing and extended payment plans.  All configured to maximize growth at the best returns for your business.
From super-prime to sub-prime, more of your customers will get access to financing, without sacrificing responsible rates.
True Approvals
Highest real approval rates that cover the full purchase amount — eliminating partial offers and driving higher conversion at the point-of-sale.
Dedicated Credit for Repurchase

Your customers, your dedicated credit — we work with you on seamless repeat purchase journeys and the option to offer a private-label experience. We never cross-sell your customer’s purchase power to competitors.
Brand & Loyalty Options

Run the program under your brand or ours. We partner with you on acquisition and loyalty strategy. We offer exclusive integrated marketing to help you drive customer growth and deeper brand engagement.
Omnichannel financing that works wherever you do business—online, in-store, telesales, or mobile—delivering a seamless, unified experience for every customer.

"I'm grateful for the speed at which ClarityPay is willing to adapt to meet our goals. In my world, the needs of the customer continue to shift, and having a financing partner that is willing to shift with you makes all the difference."
A full-suite of offers configurable by customer segment—from super prime to subprime designed to drive the highest conversion rates.
Up to 85% approval rate at the full requested amount for eligible applicants.
Increase in Conversion Rate
Up to 250% lift in sales when ClarityPay was used versus other payment options.
Higher Average Sale Amount
Up to 200% higher average sale amount with ClarityPay versus other payment options.
Seamless to launch, simple to scale, live 7-day support

Integration is effortless, with dedicated teams ensuring your systems and brand standards are supported from day one. Both merchants and customers get reliable, responsive help every day of the week, creating a smooth experience at every touchpoint.
Industry expertise meets flexible technology to meet the unique needs of every industry we serve.
Flexible payment options for  elective care and ideal treatments.
Build loyalty and drive larger baskets with integrated payment solutions.
Increase booking volume and customer loyalty with tailored payment options.
Provide financing for larger-ticket projects and renovations.
partners: - A company enabling or partnering with merchants
trust_badges: Pre-qualified up to 35,000 at Your Brand
Mockup of ClarityPay slogan "Powering Real Loans from Real Banks"

value_propositions: To support and improve site functionality, and

ClarityPay provides a point-of-sale financing platform that connects lenders (“Program Lenders”) and merchants that enable this technology (“Merchants”). ClarityPay provides technology and support services facilitating Program Lenders’ lending programs (the “Platform”). ClarityPay is not a bank, lender, or other financial institution, and we do not make credit decisions or extend credit.

We may share and collect information with service providers, which may include credit data, KYC data, Device data with Bureaus, Fraud detection vendors, communication (email and text) partners, Program Lenders, virtual card providers, Google, Hubspot, and others, to assist in responding to your inquiries or requests, or to perform business or operational functions.
If you have questions about this Privacy Notice, please contact us at support@claritypay.com.

Besides any information you may choose to submit, we also use cookies and other technologies to support website functionality. We do not make any effort to identify or otherwise track individual users. You may find out more about cookies and how to control them via your browser here: http://www.allaboutcookies.org/
Access. You have the right to request a copy of your personal data by mailing it to us on support@claritypay.com.

Rectify any inaccurate or incomplete information. In case the data subject perceive information referring to the data subject to be wrong or incomplete, they have the right to request a certain set of information to be rectified or completed by mailing it to us on support@claritypay.com.
Deletion. You have the right to request for any personal data – that ClarityPay is not obliged to keep – to be deleted by mailing it to us on support@claritypay.com.
trust_badges: Mockup of ClarityPay slogan "Powering Real Loans from Real Banks"

value_propositions: Notice must be emailed to: support@claritypay.com.

This Website contains links to other websites. We are not responsible for the content, accuracy, or opinions expressed in such websites, and such websites are not investigated, monitored, or checked for accuracy or completeness by us. Inclusion of any linked website does not imply approval or endorsement of the linked website by us.

To Us: To be valid, notices must be sent by email to support@claritypay.com or by certified mail, return receipt requested, to ClarityPay Program Services, LLC, 368 9th Avenue, New York, NY, 10001 or to such other address as we may designate from time to time.

A $25,000 consumer protection bond is on file with the State of Maine. If you have a claim against our company that cannot be resolved through informal means, you may institute an action to recover your loss from that bond by filing a written complaint with the Superintendent, Bureau of Consumer Credit Protection, 35 State House Station, Augusta, Maine 04333-0035.
ClarityPay Program Services, LLC Maryland Credit Services Business Contract

ClarityPay has obtained and retains in effect a surety bond. You have the right to maintain an action at law against ClarityPay and against the surety or trustee for damages incurred by violation of the Credit Service Organization Act, in the manner set forth under Maryland Code, Commercial Law Article, Title 14, Subtitle 19, § 14-1910.
Click <<here>> to see this Maryland Credit Services Business Contract and Notice of Cancellation as a separate document.
